title: KODAK 10.1 Inch WiFi Digital Picture Frame with 32GB Storage, Electronic Smart Digital Photo Frame 1280x800 IPS Touch Screen, Auto-Rotate, Share Moments Instantly Gifts for Women Mothers Day Christmas
features: 【10.1-inch IPS HD Touch Screen】The 10.1” WiFi digital picture frame features a high-quality HD IPS touch screen with a resolution of 1280 x 800 and a wide 178° viewing angle, allowing you to enjoy stunning visuals from any angle. It automatically rotates photos and is equipped with a stand for desk placement. Superior color reproduction perfectly preserves the vividness and charm of each photo

【Instant Wireless Sharing】Connect the digital frame to your home WiFi, download the free KODAK app onto your phone or tablet (compatible with iOS and Android), and scan the 9-digit QR code on the frame with the app to easily pair and share photos or videos. This frame allows for unlimited user connections, enabling multiple users from around the world to share photos with the frame

【32GB Storage & Extended support】The photo frame has a generous 32GB built-in memory. Additionally, you can play photos and videos by simply inserting an SD card, USB stick, or Mini USB stick directly into the frame. There are no video time limits when importing content via these methods,and a 15-second video duration limit for each video uploaded via the app

【Tabletop or Wall Mountable Flexible Placement】The sleek and simple design allows you to enhance any space, whether it’s your living room, office, or another area you frequent. Easily change and showcase your photographs to match your mood and style, making it a perfect addition for occasions such as anniversaries, birthdays, Christmas, and more

【Enhanced Functionality】This digital picture frame is not only for displaying pictures but also includes convenient features such as a calendar, clock, alarm, and weather forecast. Additionally, the frame offers a range of customizable settings, including play order, image zoom, adjustable brightness, and sleep mode, providing you with a personalized and immersive user experience
